description_long: This is a solid-body electric guitar with a single cutaway design, featuring a rich, dark reddish-brown finish and a highly figured wood grain top. The body is contoured and bordered with a cream binding, giving it a classic and elegant appearance. The hardware, including the bridge, pickups, and tuning pegs, is gold-colored, adding a touch of luxury. The neck is set into the body and has a dark fingerboard with rectangular inlays, likely made of mother-of-pearl or a similar material. The headstock is angled and fitted with three tuning pegs on each side, and the back of the guitar reveals the same deep wood finish as the front. This instrument is visually striking and would be at home in urban music venues, street performances, or displayed in a shop window.
description: A luxurious, single cutaway electric guitar with a dark reddish-brown figured wood finish, gold hardware, and cream binding. The instrument features a contoured body, dark fingerboard with inlays, and a classic headstock with gold tuners.
description_view_0: A narrow side view showing the guitar's thickness, gold hardware, and the edge of the cream binding.
description_view_1: The back view reveals the deep reddish-brown wood grain, cream binding, and the back of the neck and headstock with gold tuners.
description_view_2: The opposite side view highlights the guitar's body depth, the bridge, and the side profile of the pickups and controls.
description_view_3: The front view displays the figured wood top, gold hardware, two humbucker pickups, control knobs, and the fingerboard with inlays.
attribute_headstock_design: Angled headstock with three-per-side gold tuning pegs and a possible logo on the front
